# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    supervisor \
    nginx \
    postgresql \
    postgresql-contrib \
    redis-server \
    ca-certificates \
    curl \
    netcat-openbsd \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN mkdir -p /var/log/supervisor /var/run/postgresql /var/lib/postgresql/data \
 && chown -R postgres:postgres /var/run/postgresql /var/lib/postgresql

RUN sed -i 's/^#\?listen_addresses\s*=.*/listen_addresses = '\''*'\''/' /etc/postgresql/*/main/postgresql.conf \
 && printf "\nhost all all 0.0.0.0/0 md5\nhost all all ::/0 md5\n" >> /etc/postgresql/*/main/pg_hba.conf

RUN sed -i 's/^#\?port .*/port 5432/' /etc/postgresql/*/main/postgresql.conf

RUN sed -i 's/^#\?bind .*/bind 0.0.0.0 ::1/' /etc/redis/redis.conf \
 && sed -i 's/^protected-mode .*/protected-mode no/' /etc/redis/redis.conf \
 && sed -i 's/^port .*/port 6379/' /etc/redis/redis.conf \
 && sed -i 's|^dir .*|dir /data/redis|' /etc/redis/redis.conf \
 && mkdir -p /data/redis

RUN rm -f /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default /etc/nginx/sites-available/default
RUN cat > /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf <<'EOF'
server {
    listen 80 default_server;
    listen [::]:80 default_server;

    location / {
        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:8080;
        proxy_http_version 1.1;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
        proxy_set_header Connection "";
    }
}
EOF

RUN cat > /usr/local/bin/api-server.sh <<'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env sh
set -eu
PORT="${API_PORT:-8080}"
exec python3 -m http.server "$PORT" --bind 0.0.0.0
EOF
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends python3 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
RUN chmod +x /usr/local/bin/api-server.sh

RUN cat > /etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf <<'EOF'
[supervisord]
nodaemon=true
logfile=/var/log/supervisor/supervisord.log
pidfile=/var/run/supervisord.pid

[program:postgres]
command=/usr/lib/postgresql/%(ENV_PG_MAJOR)s/bin/postgres -D /var/lib/postgresql/data -c config_file=/etc/postgresql/%(ENV_PG_MAJOR)s/main/postgresql.conf
user=postgres
autostart=true
autorestart=true
stdout_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/postgres.log
stderr_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/postgres_err.log
environment=PG_MAJOR="16"

[program:postgres-init]
command=/bin/sh -lc 'if [ ! -s /var/lib/postgresql/data/PG_VERSION ]; then su - postgres -c "/usr/lib/postgresql/16/bin/initdb -D /var/lib/postgresql/data"; fi; if ! su - postgres -c "/usr/lib/postgresql/16/bin/pg_ctl -D /var/lib/postgresql/data -o \"-c listen_addresses=*\" -w start"; then exit 1; fi; su - postgres -c "/usr/lib/postgresql/16/bin/psql -tc \"SELECT 1 FROM pg_roles WHERE rolname='\''dev'\''\" | grep -q 1 || /usr/lib/postgresql/16/bin/psql -c \"CREATE ROLE dev WITH LOGIN SUPERUSER PASSWORD '\''dev'\'';\""; su - postgres -c "/usr/lib/postgresql/16/bin/createdb -O dev dev || true"; su - postgres -c "/usr/lib/postgresql/16/bin/pg_ctl -D /var/lib/postgresql/data -m fast -w stop"'
user=root
autostart=true
autorestart=false
priority=1
stdout_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/postgres_init.log
stderr_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/postgres_init_err.log

[program:redis]
command=redis-server /etc/redis/redis.conf
autostart=true
autorestart=true
stdout_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/redis.log
stderr_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/redis_err.log

[program:api]
command=/usr/local/bin/api-server.sh
autostart=true
autorestart=true
stdout_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/api.log
stderr_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/api_err.log

[program:nginx]
command=nginx -g "daemon off;"
autostart=true
autorestart=true
stdout_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/nginx.log
stderr_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/nginx_err.log
EOF

EXPOSE 80 8080 5432 6379

VOLUME ["/var/lib/postgresql/data", "/data/redis"]

CMD ["/usr/bin/supervisord", "-c", "/etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf"]
